mte_summary: BPMS015 validation for subcontracted purchase requisitions

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: Missing Peg/GI Info

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition using a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL). Ensure peg/GI information is missing. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected due to missing info.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected due to missing info and email is received stating rejection and reasons.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL
Ensure pegging information is missing
Submit for approval
Email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to PEG/GL info missing

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: Blank BP or Employee Supplier

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition using a subcontracted item (ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL). Ensure business partner is blank or set to EMPloyee. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected after buyer review.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected after buyer review and email is received stating rejection and reasons.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with item ZZZSPL-SUBCON-S09-TOOL
Ensure business partner is blank or set to EMPloyee
steps.expected_result: Business partner is blank or set to EMPloyee

steps.action: Submit for approval
Email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to blank BP or EMPloyee supplier

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: SubConDefault Not Linked to Production Order

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition using a SubConDefault item not linked to a production order. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected after buyer review.
description.expected_result: Purchase requis, ition rejected after buyer review and email is received stating rejection and reasons.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with SubConDefault item not linked to production order
Submit for approval
Email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to SubConDefault not linked to production order

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Purchase Requisition: Multi-line with Subcontracted Items

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition with multiple lines, some of which are subcontracted items. Submit for approval. Check email is received and requisition is rejected after buyer review.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition rejected after buyer review and email is received stating rejection and reasons.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition with multiple lines, some of which are subcontracted items
Submit for approval
Email stating purchase requisition is rejected due to multi-line with subcontracted items

description.scenario: Create a standard purchase requisition. Submit for approval through BPMS015. Approve through the workflow.
description.expected_result: Purchase requisition is approved and proceeds through the workflow without issues.

steps.action: Create standard purchase requisition
Submit for approval
Approve through BPMS015 workflow

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Requisition Auto-rejection for Missing Peg/GI Info

description.scenario: Create a subcontracted purchase requisition with missing peg/GI information. Submit for approval. Check if auto-rejected and email received.
description.expected_result: Requisition auto-rejected with email notification for missing peg/GI information.

steps.action: Create subcontracted purchase requisition with missing peg/GI information
Submit for approval
Email stating requisition auto-rejected due to missing peg/GI information

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Requisition Rejected After Buyer Review for Blank BP

description.scenario: Create a subcontracted purchase requisition with blank business partner. Submit for approval. Check if rejected after buyer review and email received.
description.expected_result: Requisition rejected after buyer review with email notification for blank business partner.

steps.action: Create subcontracted purchase requisition with blank business partner
Submit for approval
Email stating requisition rejected after buyer review due to blank BP

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Requisition Rejected After Buyer Review for SubConDefault Not Linked to Production Order

description.scenario: Create a subcontracted purchase requisition using SubConDefault item not linked to production order. Submit for approval. Check if rejected after buyer review and email received.
description.expected_result: Requisition rejected after buyer review with email notification for SubConDefault not linked to production order.

steps.action: Create subcontracted purchase requisition using SubConDefault item not linked to production order
Submit for approval
Email stating requisition rejected after buyer review due to SubConDefault not linked to production order

test_cases.summary: Subcontracted Requisition Rejected After Buyer Review for Multi-line with Subcontracted Items

description.scenario: Create a subcontracted purchase requisition with multiple lines, some of which are subcontracted items. Submit for approval. Check if rejected after buyer review and email received.
description.expected_result: Requisition rejected after buyer review with email notification for multi-line with subcontracted items.

steps.action: Create subcontracted purchase requisition with multiple lines, some of which are subcontracted items
Submit for approval
Email stating requisition rejected after buyer review due to multi-line with subcontracted items
